title: Essay paragraph: body
text: One clear example of this trend is the rise of short-form video platforms, which have transformed not only entertainment but also how students study, share information, and even apply for jobs in the modern workplace.

tips.target: One clear example of this trend is the rise of short-form video platforms, which have transformed not
only entertainment but also how students study, share information, and even apply for jobs in the modern workplace.

character_tips.anna: Body paragraph structure. Real essay format at speed.
character_tips.maxim: Argument prose = your real writing voice. Train it.
character_tips.klavochka: Building a strong argument, my treasure 🏛️
